overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a slow exploration through a dark, misty canyon with moss-covered rock walls and a central stream, gradually approaching an opening where ancient ruins are silhouetted against a night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep narrow canyon with moss-covered walls and stream

agents.ego_description: moving cautiously through the dark canyon passage, observing the mossy rock walls and shallow stream

entered.detail: steep moss-covered rock wall forming the left side of the canyon
steep moss-covered rock wall forming the right side of the canyon
shallow water stream running along the canyon floor
large rocks covered in green moss scattered along the canyon path

segments.scene_description: The segment depicts a dark, enclosed canyon passage with steep moss-covered rock walls flanking both sides and a shallow stream running through the center. The camera moves steadily forward through the narrow space, illuminated only by dim ambient light reflecting off the wet rocks.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon passage approaching exit with visible sky and ancient ruins

events.description: sky becomes visible at the canyon exit ahead, introducing natural light
ancient stone ruins become visible silhouetted against the night sky at the canyon's end

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward the canyon exit, approaching the visible ruins structure

entered.detail: patch of night sky visible through the canyon exit, creating a light source
stone fortress or temple ruins visible on the cliff edge against the sky

segments.scene_description: As the camera approaches the canyon exit, the scene brightens with natural light from the opening ahead. Ancient stone ruins become visible silhouetted against the night sky at the canyon's end, while the moss-covered walls continue to flank the path on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, enclosed canyon that gradually opens toward a luminous vista of ancient ruins. It begins by gliding forward through a narrow passage, where steep moss-covered rock walls flank a shallow stream under dim, ambient light. As the camera advances, the oppressive shadows of the canyon begin to recede, replaced by a growing glow from the exit ahead. The scene then expands as the camera approaches the opening, revealing the silhouettes of stone ruins set against a vast night sky.
